'''Fwiis''' was a colony world between [[Darepp]] and [[Motexx]] visited by the ''[[Star Morning]]'' after it departed [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. It was more than 150 light-years away from [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]].

{{Planet-stub}}
